channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: President reaffirms importance of strong Govt, Church ties
item.description: Debra Matabvu-Senior Reporter PRESIDENT MNANGAGWA has reaffirmed the importance of a strong partnership between the Government and the Church in promoting peace, national unity and socio-economic development. This followed a... (via H-metro) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: H-metro

item.title: Government fast-tracks reintegration of youth returnees
item.description: Ray Bande Senior Reporter THE Government is carrying out a registration and training needs assessment for young Zimbabweans returning from South Africa as part of efforts to facilitate their reintegration... (via H-metro) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: H-metro

item.title: Highlanders chairman, vice and treasurer killed in road accident
item.description: Club chiefs were returning from Kariba after Wednesday’s match with ZPC Kariba The post Highlanders chairman, vice and treasurer killed in road accident appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Kasambabezi Border Post to unlock Binga’s economic potential: Ministert Kazembe @bulawayo24
item.description: BINGA - For years, Binga residents watched trucks and traders take long detours to cross into Zambia. That changes this week.The Kasambabezi Border Post, linking Zimbabwe and Zambia through Binga, wil... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: WATCH: Wessly Madhevere on Harare pitch Conditions, top-order collapse & facing India’s bowling @3menonaboat
item.description:
Returning Zimbabwe batter Wessly Madhevere gives his honest post-match reaction following Zimbabwe’s performance in the 1st T20I against India at Harare Sports Club.

The post WATCH: Wessly Madhevere on Harare pitch Conditions, top-order collapse & facing India’s bowling first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: School bus hit with US$30 fine over Route Authority requirement, questions raised @bulawayo24 @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: A traffic enforcement operation by the Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) in Mbembesi has sparked questions after a school bus was allegedly issued with a US$30 deposit fine for operating without a Route... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Parliamentary committee recommends Commission of Inquiry to resolve Hwange governance crisis @bulawayo24
item.description: The Parliamentary Portfolio Committee on Local Government, Public Works and National Housing has recommended the establishment of a Commission of Inquiry to resolve long‐standing governance challenges... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Prince Dube scores again as Hardrock beat Agama, Hunters shock CAPS United
item.description: Prince Dube strikes again as Hardrock defeat Agama, while Hunters stun CAPS United in a dramatic Castle Lager Premier Soccer League day. The post Prince Dube scores again as Hardrock beat Agama, Hunters shock CAPS United appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: The “Constitutional Coup”: Inside the Legal Battle to Declare Constitutional Amendment No. 3 NULL and VOID!
item.description: Harare – A profound legal and political maelstrom has engulfed Zimbabwe, as a daring challenge to the recently enacted Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No. 3) Act, 2026, threatens to unravel President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s bid for an extended term. At the heart of this unfolding drama is Vhurande Mahlupeko, a National Constitutional Assembly (NCA) National Executive [...] The post The “Constitutional Coup”: Inside the Legal Battle to Declare Constitutional Amendment No. 3 NULL and VOID! first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Police’s Hunt for Madzibaba Veshanduko: Why Some Govt Officials are Afraid of a Man in a Yellow Robe @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: Harare – Godfrey Karembera, known to his fervent followers and the apprehensive state alike as Madzibaba Veshanduko, has once again found himself at the centre of a political maelstrom in Zimbabwe. Despite a recent acquittal that saw him walk free after eight months in pre-trial detention, the Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) has issued a fresh [...] The post Police’s Hunt for Madzibaba Veshanduko: Why Some Govt Officials are Afraid of a Man in a Yellow Robe first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Last-Minute ZiG200K Repayment Saves Ministers From Jail In Landmark Borrowing Case
item.description: Ministers Dodge Jail After Hasty Compliance With Court Order Over Borrowing Delinquency In Landmark Lawsuit Two Zimbabwean Cabinet ministers have avoided possible imprisonment after they eventually complied with a High Court order requiring them to repay more than ZiG208,699 borrowed from government welfare funds without Treasury approval. The latest development follows contempt of court proceedings [...] The post Last-Minute ZiG200K Repayment Saves Ministers From Jail In Landmark Borrowing Case appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

Prince Dube on target for Hardrock

item.title: Murwira Urges Zim to Open Markets to Drive Investment and Industrial Growth @263Chat
item.description: By Kudzaishe Chimonera Zimbabwe must build investor confidence and open its markets if it is to accelerate industrialisation and fully benefit from regional trade agreements, Minister of Foreign Affairs and International Trade Professor Amon Murwira has said. Speaking during a high-level panel discussion at the [...] The post Murwira Urges Zim to Open Markets to Drive Investment and Industrial Growth appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Italy in crisis: federation sounds out Pep Guardiola and Carlo Ancelotti for coach @ManCity
item.description: MILAN — The Italian soccer federation (FIGC) has talked to former Manchester City coach Pep Guardiola and Brazil boss Carlo Ancelotti about taking over the crisis-hit national team. It hopes to announce the new Italy coach within the week, with the Azzurri still reeling after failing for a third straight time to qualify for the [...] The post Italy in crisis: federation sounds out Pep Guardiola and Carlo Ancelotti for coach appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail
